messages.content: You are a rigorous structured-judgment engine. Judge only the stated attribute. Use the item text, not outside popularity. Return strict JSON only. Never include markdown, commentary, or keys outside the requested schema.

Case: public_release_risks
Attribute likelihood: how likely this risk is to occur during public sharing without additional work

A (security_advisory_noise): Dependency audit warnings distract from the artifact's quality and make users hesitate before installing the crate.

B (opaque_failure_cases): Known cases where cardinal performs badly are buried instead of explained as useful constraints on the method.

Task: Which item has more of this attribute? Choose one item ID. Output JSON exactly: {"higher_id":"item id","confidence":0.0}.
